description: Starter grounding corpus manifest. Source CAD files remain on the local machine; this repo stores only metadata, validation notes, and curation status.

validation_notes: Validated through the live host spike and the end-to-end host validation script on 2026-03-11.
Use as the baseline native part fixture for active-document, summary, and empty-selection checks.
Validated against the live add-in through the typed COM open helper on 2026-03-11.
Read-only installed sample under Program Files; useful for verifying path handling outside C:\SOLIDWORKS.
Confirmed on 2026-03-11 as the first custom-property benchmark fixture via document-level UNIT_OF_MEASURE metadata.
Validated against the live add-in on 2026-03-12 as the first nontrivial dimensions benchmark fixture.
Returns dimension_count=78 with a stable 50-item preview from feature-owned display dimensions.
Validated in the live host loop on 2026-03-11 with successful active-document and document-summary extraction.
Use as the first curated assembly fixture for installed-sample grounding checks.
Validated in the live host loop on 2026-03-12 as the first nontrivial reference-graph fixture.
Read-only installed mold benchmark sample with direct_count=5 and transitive_count=28 through get_reference_graph.
Use for dependency/reference evaluation instead of the GenerateAssembly sample, which returns an empty dependency set.
